description_long: This object is a set of four modern smartphones, each with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners. The phones are presented in four distinct colors: black, red, blue, and silver, with a matte or slightly glossy finish. On the back of each phone, there is a prominent rectangular camera module located in the upper left corner, featuring multiple lenses and a small display or sensor area. The back panel also displays a small, square brand logo positioned towards the lower half. The sides of the phones are smooth, with no visible physical buttons or ports from these angles. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for urban environments.
description: A set of four sleek, modern smartphones in black, red, blue, and silver, each with a large rear camera module and a small brand logo on the back.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the camera modules and brand logos on the back of all four phones, aligned in a row.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the colored backs, camera modules, and the brand logos more centrally on each phone.
description_view_2: Rear view from the opposite side, emphasizing the camera modules and the color sequence from black to silver.
description_view_3: Angled view from the top, showing the camera modules and the colored backs, with the brand logos visible near the top edge.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, square, white logo is present on the back of each phone, positioned towards the lower half or near the top edge depending on the view.
attribute_screen_display_content: No screen content is visible; only the backs of the phones are shown.
attribute_camera_placement: Each phone has a large rectangular camera module in the upper left corner of the back, containing multiple lenses and a small display or sensor area.
